statementString: SELECT OUTAGES.*, NODE.NODELABEL, NODE.LOCATION, IPINTERFACE.IPHOSTNAME, SERVICE.SERVICENAME, NOTIFICATIONS.NOTIFYID, NOTIFICATIONS.ANSWEREDBY FROM OUTAGES JOIN NODE USING(NODEID) JOIN IPINTERFACE ON OUTAGES.NODEID=IPINTERFACE.NODEID AND OUTAGES.IPADDR=IPINTERFACE.IPADDR LEFT OUTER JOIN SERVICE USING(SERVICEID) LEFT OUTER JOIN NOTIFICATIONS ON SVCLOSTEVENTID=NOTIFICATIONS.EVENTID WHERE OUTAGEID=?

@io.github.eisop.opsc.qual.Sql(in={"INTEGER"}, out={"INTEGER outageid", "TIMESTAMP iflostservice", "TIMESTAMP ifregainedservice", "INTEGER nodeid", "VARCHAR nodelabel", "VARCHAR location", "VARCHAR ipaddr", "VARCHAR iphostname", "VARCHAR servicename", "INTEGER serviceid"}, file="/artifact/projects/opennms/opennms-annos/opennms-webapp/src/main/java/org/opennms/web/outage/OutageModel.java", line="67", column="38")
statementString:
SELECT DISTINCT 
         outages.outageid, outages.iflostservice, outages.ifregainedservice, node.nodeID, 
         node.nodeLabel, 
         node.location, 
         ipinterface.ipaddr, 
         ipinterface.iphostname, 
         service.servicename, 
         ifservices.serviceId 
    from outages 
    join ifservices 
      on ifservices.id = outages.ifserviceid 
    join ipinterface 
      on ipinterface.id = ifservices.ipinterfaceid 
    join node 
       on node.nodeid = ipinterface.nodeid 
    join service 
      on ifservices.serviceid = service.serviceid 
   where node.nodeid = ? 
     and outages.perspective is null 
     and outages.ifregainedservice is null 
     and outages.suppresstime is null 
      or outages.suppresstime < now() 
order by iflostservice desc

statementString: SELECT DISTINCT node.nodeid, node.location, outages.iflostservice as timeDown, outages.ifregainedservice as timeUp, node.nodelabel FROM outages, node, ipinterface, ifservices WHERE node.nodeid=ipinterface.nodeid AND ipinterface.id=ifservices.ipinterfaceid AND ifservices.id=outages.ifserviceid AND node.nodeType != 'D' AND ipinterface.ismanaged != 'D' AND ifservices.status != 'D' AND outages.iflostservice >= ? AND outages.perspective IS NULL ORDER BY timeDown DESC;
